Label: Factual & Procedural Accuracy1
Element (Question): Can the bot correctly identify institutional roles and authority?

Why it matters: This matters because effective civic engagement depends on correctly identifying where decision-making power lies.

Label: Factual & Procedural Accuracy2
Element (Question): Can the bot accurately explain the process sequence?

Label: Clarity & Usability
Element (Question): Can the bot clearly define key terminology?

Label: Contextual Relevance
Element (Question): Can the bot ground the answer in the correct jurisdiction?

Label: Actionability

Label: Civic Responsibility

Label: Actionability1
